message:
test(e2e): unlock lessons via localStorage and fix selector ambiguity in e2e specs

Adds localStorage setup to DCG, RU, and SRPS e2e tests so lesson pages
are accessible without manual progression. Also expands the DCG tool
title to its full name, adds aria-label to copy buttons, fixes a
duplicate-element selector with .first(), and sets completedSteps in
the wizard-flow redirect test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
